title: Shutdown
description: Adds a Quit to Desktop button to your game pause menu.
body:
⏻

**_Skip the main menu. Quit straight to desktop._** > Shutdown adds a small power button next to the "Save and Quit to Title" button in your pause menu — click it and you're out. An alternative to Alt+F4. --- - Power button that turns red on hover - Optional confirmation popup - Optional Session time played shown in the tooltip
